obsidian.description: Obsidian REST API bridge (cyanheads) — frontmatter management, tag ops, global search, search-and-replace. Requires Obsidian running with Local REST API plugin.

obsidian-fs.description: Obsidian filesystem bridge (StevenStavrakis) — direct vault read/write, multi-vault support, tag management. No Obsidian required. Fallback when Obsidian is not running.
